name: Sauerbraten
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. Pierce the roast with whole garlic cloves.
3. Season the entire roast with Essence, salt, and pepper.
4. Place the roast in a deep glass bowl.
5. In a mixing bowl, whisk together red wine, onions, herbs, and sugar.
6. Whisk until the sugar dissolves.
7. Pour the marinade over the roast and cover with plastic wrap.
8. Refrigerate for 72 hours.
9. Remove the roast from the marinade and strain it.
10. Place the roast in a braising pan.
11. Add veal stock to the strained liquid, ensuring it covers half of the roast.
12. Braise covered in the oven for 2-3 hours, turning the meat occasionally.
13. If needed, add additional stock.
14. Remove the pan from the oven and place over a burner.
15. Bring the liquid to a simmer.
16. Whisk crushed gingersnap cookies into the liquid until fully incorporated.
17. Simmer the sauce for 2-3 minutes.
18. Season with salt and pepper.
19. Serve Sauerbraten with potato pancakes and braised cabbage.
20. Spoon the ginger snap sauce over the meat.
21. Garnish with chives and brunoise peppers.
Yield: 6-8 servings
